item.title: MLB Announces Rule Changes for 2026 Season
item.description: Major League Baseball has announced a new set of rule changes taking effect this season.

item.title: Braves Sign New Closer in Blockbuster Deal
item.description: The Braves announced a major bullpen acquisition today signing a top closer.

item.title: Top Prospect Called Up by Dodgers
item.description: The Dodgers called up their top prospect from Triple-A ahead of opening day.
